test-method.name: verifyOrangeHRMLogo
test-method.description: Verify OrangeHRM Logo visibility on Home Page

exception.message: Skipping the test as part of testing

test-method.name: invalidLoginTest
test-method.description: Verify error message with invalid credentials

exception.message: Test Failed: The expected error message 'Invalid credentials1' was not displayed. expected [true] but found [false]

test-method.name: verifyValidLoginTest
